ddls:
CREATE TABLE "i2c_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the I2C timing parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units in which the parameter values are measured */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "standard_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the I2C standard or specification */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User ID of the last modifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the device */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the device was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the device information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_parameters" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-parameter mapping */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "validated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the parameter has been validated for the device */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks */,
  "validated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the validator */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES i2c_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter version */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this version becomes effective */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES i2c_parameters ("parameter_id")
)
column_names: Name of the I2C timing parameter
Units in which the parameter values are measured
Reference to the I2C standard or specification
User ID of the last modifier
Unique part number for the device
Date when the device was added to the system
Date when the device information was last updated
Unique identifier for each device-parameter mapping
Flag indicating if the parameter has been validated for the device
Date when the parameter was validated
Unique identifier for each parameter version
Description of changes in this version
Date when this version becomes effective
Date when the change was made
